title: Documentation - LFX health and contributions links are broken
body: ### Issue Description Hey there, as part of my development of my open source project [Deadlink-Hunter](https://github.com/Deadlink-Hunter/Broken-Link-Website) I found this repo and I just noticed that both of those links: Seems to be broken: ### If this was helpful, consider leaving a [⭐](https://github.com/Deadlink-Hunter/Broken-Link-Website) on the project, much appreciated! ### Steps to reproduce the issue Steps to reproduce the issue 1. 2. 3. ### Describe the results you received Describe the results you received ### Describe the results you expected Describe the results you expected ### podman info output ```yaml If you are unable to run podman info for any reason, please provide the podman version, operating system and its version and the architecture you are running. ``` ### Podman in a container No ### Privileged Or Rootless None ### Upstream Latest Release Yes ### Additional environment details Additional environment details ### Additional information Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: Thanks @Tamir198, cool project! I opened https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27790 to rectify this.
